Metadata.primaryObjective: Resolve the active objective for Tutorial.

Data.Name: North Wall Directive
Data.Description: Black stencil letters on the north wall read COMPLIANCE IS RECOVERY. The paint is newer than the concrete.
Data.FlavorText: Black stencil letters on the north wall read COMPLIANCE IS RECOVERY. The paint is newer than the concrete.

Data.Name: Left Monitor
Data.Description: The monitor to the left loops an abstract music video: four masked singers in white coats cross a red triangle stage while the title card reads POP NULL.
Data.FlavorText: The monitor to the left loops an abstract music video: four masked singers in white coats cross a red triangle stage while the title card reads POP NULL.

Data.Name: Suture Tray
Data.Description: A metal tray holds a spool of black eyelid thread, three bent clamps, and a glass vial labeled LOCAL ONLY.
Data.FlavorText: A metal tray holds a spool of black eyelid thread, three bent clamps, and a glass vial labeled LOCAL ONLY.

Data.Name: Cyberware Station
Data.Description: A calibration station idles beside the wall. Its display shows three amber bars and a warning: OPTIC BUS UNPAIRED.
Data.FlavorText: A calibration station idles beside the wall. Its display shows three amber bars and a warning: OPTIC BUS UNPAIRED.

Data.Name: IV Pump Rack
Data.Description: Three clear bags hang from the rack. The middle bag is stamped SEDATIVE B, but the tube is dry and curled like old wire.
Data.FlavorText: Three clear bags hang from the rack. The middle bag is stamped SEDATIVE B, but the tube is dry and curled like old wire.

Data.Name: Diagnostic Console
Data.Description: A console scrolls recovery prompts in a strict order: auditory, language, optics, motor. Someone circled optics twice.
Data.FlavorText: A console scrolls recovery prompts in a strict order: auditory, language, optics, motor. Someone circled optics twice.

Data.Name: Damaged Survey Drone
Data.Description: The collapsed drone is tagged KESTREL-9. Its cracked lens still points toward the east wall markings.
Data.FlavorText: The collapsed drone is tagged KESTREL-9. Its cracked lens still points toward the east wall markings.

Data.Name: Locked Door
Data.Description: A sealed 1x3 lab door set into the right wall. The latch housing is dark, and the manual override slot has been filled with red resin.
Data.FlavorText: A sealed 1x3 lab door set into the right wall. The latch housing is dark, and the manual override slot has been filled with red resin.

Data.Name: Patient Kit
Data.Description: A sealed recovery pouch clipped to the chair rail. The printed label reads: SUBJECT 7734 - BASIC RESPONSE.
Data.FlavorText: Everything inside is sized for trembling hands and minimum trust.

Data.Name: Nutrition Pack
Data.Description: A silver nutrient pouch with a peel-away straw. The formula is bland, dense, and designed for post-sedation digestion.
Data.FlavorText: The packet warns you not to taste it too carefully.

Data.Name: Water Pouch
Data.Description: A soft hydration pouch with a sealed bite valve. Condensation beads on the sterile plastic.
Data.FlavorText: Cold enough to feel like evidence of kindness.

Data.Name: Sealed Trauma Patch
Data.Description: A pressure-sealed medical patch for shallow cranial trauma and surgical abrasions. The applicator flexes once, then locks.
Data.FlavorText: The instructions assume you can read while bleeding.

Data.Name: East Wall Markings
Data.Description: Five white tally marks are scratched into the east wall, each crossed by a small diagonal cut.
Data.FlavorText: Five white tally marks are scratched into the east wall, each crossed by a small diagonal cut.
